mapper.select: SELECT log_id, ticket_id, operation_type, from_status, to_status, operator_id, operator_name, comment, operate_time FROM ticket_operation_log WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY operate_time DESC

SELECT log_id, ticket_id, operation_type, from_status, to_status, operator_id, operator_name, comment, operate_time FROM ticket_operation_log WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND operation_type = 'PROCESS' AND comment IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(comment) != '' ORDER BY operate_time DESC, log_id DESC LIMIT 1
